method_summary: The AI Scientist generates novel research ideas, writes code, executes experiments, visualizes results, writes full scientific papers, and runs a simulated review process in an automated, iterative fashion.
key_innovation: The development of a fully automated system that can perform the entire scientific discovery process from idea generation to paper writing and evaluation.
best_result: Papers exceeding acceptance threshold at a top machine learning conference
title: The AI Scientist: Towards Fully Automated Open-Ended Scientific Discovery
